assertions.assertion: Calls AddJwtBearer with Authority set to 'https://identity.example.com'
Sets TokenValidationParameters.ValidTypes to include 'at+jwt' to prevent JWT confusion attacks
assertions.rationale: ValidTypes is not set at all. This is a Duende-specific security best practice that a generic dev would likely miss.

assertions.assertion: Includes UseAuthentication() before UseAuthorization() in the middleware pipeline

assertions.rationale: Package is mentioned via dotnet add command.
